dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The world changed ten years ago. Dungeons appeared, monsters poured out, and with them, Hunters. Those blessed with abilities to fight back.

dialogue.speaker: HAN YOOJIN
dialogue.line: (thought) Me? I was an F-class. The lowest of the low. A useless burden, barely capable of clearing a Rank F dungeon, and even then, I usually came out bruised and battered.

dialogue.speaker: HAN YOOJIN
dialogue.line: (thought) My younger brother, Han Yoohyun, was different. He was a prodigy. An S-class. The youngest ever. He carried the weight of our family, of the world, on his shoulders. While I... I was just a burden.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He remembered the end. The catastrophic dungeon break. The desperate, futile fight. The overwhelming despair as the city crumbled around him.

dialogue.speaker: HAN YOOJIN
dialogue.line: (thought) I died. Crushed under a monster's claw, watching the city burn. My only regret was Yoohyun. I couldn't protect him. I couldn't even stand beside him. He deserved so much more than a brother like me.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GASP

dialogue.speaker: HAN YOOJIN
dialogue.line: (dialogue, groggy) Ugh... My head...

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Han Yoojin blinked, the harsh morning light stinging his eyes. He was in his old, familiar apartment. The one he'd moved out of years ago, before everything went to hell.

dialogue.speaker: HAN YOOJIN
dialogue.line: (thought) This... this isn't right. I was just... I was dead. This room, this cheap wallpaper... it's from five years ago.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: RUSTLE (of sheets)

dialogue.speaker: HAN YOOJIN
dialogue.line: (thought) The calendar on the wall... September 1st, 20XX. This date... it's before the Great Dungeon Break. Before Yoohyun became an S-class and started carrying the world alone.

dialogue.speaker: HAN YOOJIN
dialogue.line: (thought) Is this... a dream? A hallucination before death? Am I just going insane?

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [Welcome, Awakened. Skill: My Brat is the Best (S-Class Hunter Cultivation) has been activated.]

dialogue.speaker: HAN YOOJIN
dialogue.line: (thought) My... My Brat is the Best? That useless F-class skill I got when I first awakened? The one that just gave me a tiny buff when I was near my younger sibling? But it says... S-Class Hunter Cultivation?

dialogue.speaker: HAN YOOJIN
dialogue.line: (thought) No, wait. This isn't just a buff. This is a full-blown system message. Like the ones the high-ranking hunters talked about, the ones that appeared when their unique skills truly manifested. And the skill name itself... it's different.

dialogue.speaker: HAN YOOJIN
dialogue.line: (thought) I remember now. Before I died, a strange, warm light enveloped me. A whisper... 'A second chance.' It wasn't a hallucination. It was real.

dialogue.speaker: HAN YOOJIN
dialogue.line: (dialogue, voice trembling) I... I went back in time.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUMP-THUMP (heartbeat)

dialogue.speaker: HAN YOOJIN
dialogue.line: (thought) This isn't a dream. This is real. I have a second chance. A chance to change things. A chance to save Yoohyun from the path of suffering he walked in my past life.

dialogue.speaker: HAN YOOJIN
dialogue.line: (thought) In my past life, Yoohyun pushed himself too hard. He fought alone, shouldering every burden, every expectation. He grew distant, cold, burdened by responsibilities. I couldn't help him. I was too weak, too useless.

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [Skill details: Allows the user to foster the growth of a designated 'Brat' (sibling or close relative) into an S-Class Hunter. Provides various support effects, growth buffs, and unique opportunities. Initial target set: Han Yoohyun.]

dialogue.speaker: HAN YOOJIN
dialogue.line: (thought) This is it. This is my chance. I won't let him suffer alone this time. I won't be a useless F-class burden. I'll be the best older brother. I'll raise him properly, protect him, make sure he's happy.

dialogue.speaker: HAN YOOJIN
dialogue.line: (dialogue, resolute) Yoohyun... I'm coming for you.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He quickly got out of bed, his mind racing with a mix of shock and fierce determination. He needed to find Yoohyun. He needed to understand this powerful, reborn skill. Most importantly, he needed to prepare.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CREAK (floorboards)

dialogue.speaker: HAN YOOJIN
dialogue.line: (thought) First, I need to check the news. What's the current state of the dungeons? Who's who in the Hunter Association? I need to remember every detail that could give me an advantage.

dialogue.speaker: HAN YOOJIN
dialogue.line: (thought) And then... I need to find Yoohyun before he makes any rash decisions. Before he gets involved with anyone shady. Before he pushes himself to the brink, just like last time.

dialogue.speaker: HAN YOOJIN
dialogue.line: (thought) This time, I'll be the one raising the S-class. And my S-class... will be the strongest, the happiest, and the one who doesn't have to carry the world alone.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLICK (door opening)

dialogue.speaker: HAN YOOJIN
dialogue.line: (dialogue, to himself, a small, determined smile forming) Let's do this, Han Yoojin. For Yoohyun. For a better future.

summary: Han Yoojin, a useless F-class hunter, wakes up five years in the past after dying in a dungeon break. He realizes his unique skill, 'My Brat is the Best', has evolved, granting him the ability to cultivate S-class hunters, specifically targeting his younger brother, Han Yoohyun. Determined to change their tragic future, he resolves to raise Yoohyun properly this time.
